sizing_rule.note: Position size inversely scaled to stop-loss width relative to daily range. Tighter stops (< 0.5× daily range) trigger smaller position sizing (0.25× multiplier) to maintain consistent portfolio risk. Implements inverse volatility/stop-width scaling.

source_rule_text: Position size must be inversely scaled to stop-loss width: tighter stops require proportionally smaller risk per trade to maintain consistent portfolio risk management.
